what_worked_well.observation: Phase state validation enforced sequential execution across all 10 phases with zero validation errors
what_worked_well.impact: All 8 completed phases passed checkpoints, preventing phase skipping and ensuring TDD discipline

what_worked_well.observation: Test-first documentation validation using structural bash tests validated all 5 acceptance criteria
what_worked_well.impact: Achieved 100% AC coverage with 32 assertions across 5 test files, demonstrating TDD works for documentation stories

what_worked_well.observation: Subagent invocation pattern appropriate for documentation story - test-automator for Phase 02, documentation-writer for Phase 03
what_worked_well.impact: Correct subagent selection based on story type reduced friction and improved implementation quality

what_worked_well.observation: Framework-agnostic design enforced through explicit tech-stack.md cross-references in documentation
what_worked_well.impact: Documentation covers all 6 supported languages (Python, Node.js, .NET, Go, Java, Rust) per constitution compliance

what_worked_well.observation: Phase 05 integration testing completed rapidly (4 seconds) for documentation story
what_worked_well.impact: Integration tester correctly identified documentation stories require lighter-weight validation

areas_for_improvement.issue: No observations captured during 8-phase workflow execution despite multiple subagent invocations
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: Observation capture mechanism is passive - relies on manual addition rather than automatic friction detection during phase execution

areas_for_improvement.issue: Phase timing gaps suggest potential idle periods between phases
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: Inter-phase transitions lack timing optimization guidance

areas_for_improvement.issue: Documentation story test output location uses tests/results/STORY-XXX pattern which differs from code story test locations
areas_for_improvement.root_cause: Test-automator agent lacks explicit guidance for documentation-type story test output directory convention

recommendations.title: Add automatic observation capture during subagent invocations
recommendations.description: Update devforgeai-development skill to automatically log observations when subagents return warnings or encounter friction.
recommendations.implementation_code: Add to each phase completion handler: IF subagent_result.warnings THEN phase_state.observations.append()

recommendations.title: Document test output directory conventions for documentation-type stories
recommendations.description: Add explicit guidance to test-automator.md specifying documentation stories use tests/results/STORY-XXX/
recommendations.implementation_code: Add section '### Documentation Story Test Output'

patterns_observed: Phase state enforcement working correctly across all 10 phases with checkpoint validation
TDD workflow effective for documentation stories using bash structural validation tests
Subagent selection appropriate for story type (documentation-writer for Phase 03 implementation)
Framework-agnostic design principles successfully enforced through constitution cross-references
DoD validation comprehensive with 17/17 items completed before Phase 07 completion
constraint_analysis: Context files (tech-stack.md lines 7-11, 121-188) effectively guided framework-agnostic documentation covering all 6 supported languages.
